title: TROUBLE DIAGNOSIS

rows.probable_cause_symptoms:
• Accelerator switch is faulty (Accelerator switch stays "OFF")
• Accelerator position switch is faulty (Accelerator switch stays "OFF")
Vehicle creeps because accelerator is released but accelerator switch is "OFF" (same condition as if pedal is depressed).
rows.countermeasure:
• Check accelerator switch and accelerator position switch.
• Check functioning of accelerator switch and accelerator position switch
• Check N-CVT control unit harness

rows.probable_cause_symptoms:
Clutch circuit negative (-) side is short-circuited
Vehicle creeps due to high drag current. Engine may stop when this occurs

Excessive torque is transmitted by electromagnetic clutch
The electromagnetic clutch may be faulty. When this is the case, the influence of the stall speed and select operability can be checked. For this reason, when only vehicle creep occurs, it may be considered as a temporary condition until the powder wears in.
rows.countermeasure: • Replace electromagnetic clutch if part is faulty.

model_notes: N-CVT (Nissan Continuously Variable Transmission) specific diagnosis chart related to vehicle creep conditions.
